info.title: Operations Center — Flags API
info.description:
**Flags** mark locations or issues on fields; **flag categories** classify flags (reference, master, or custom). Use these endpoints to list, create, update, and delete flags and categories, and to manage **flag category preferences** (for example default color).

**Accept / Content-Type:** Use `application/vnd.deere.axiom.v3+json` for request and response bodies where applicable.

**Paging:** List responses may use a **CollectionPage** wrapper (`total`, `links`, `values`). Default page size is often **10**; use **`itemLimit`** (multiples of **10**, max **100**) and **`pageOffset`** where supported.

**Links:** Responses include HATEOAS **`links`**. Use **`showLinks=none`** or filtered **`showLinks`** to trim payloads.

**Permissions:** Creating, updating, or deleting flags and categories requires **Locations Level 3** (OAuth scope **`ag3`**). Reading typically requires **`ag1`**.

**Events:** **Flag** and **Flag Category** events are delivered via the **Data Subscription Service** (requires **`orgId`** filter; other filters optional). Prefer one organization per subscription.

tags.name: Flags
tags.description: Flag resources under `/platform/organizations/{orgId}/flags` and field-scoped flags.

OAuth2AuthorizationCode.description: OAuth 2.0 authorization code flow for John Deere Precision Tech platform APIs. Complete the **connections** flow when **GET** `/platform/organizations` returns a **`connections`** link. Flag endpoints require **`ag1`** (read) and/or **`ag3`** (create/update/delete) as noted per operation. Use **`offline_access`** for refresh tokens.

scopes.ag1: Locations Access Level 1 — view locations (clients, farms, fields)
scopes.ag3: Locations Access Level 3 — manage locations and production data

Flag.description: A flag in an organization. Response shape follows Axiom v3; **links** discover related resources.

FlagCreateBody.description: Request body to create a flag in the organization.

FlagUpdateBody.description: Request body to update a flag by organization and flag id.

FlagCategory.description: A flag category (reference, master from reference, or user-defined). Name may be translated per request language.

FlagCategoryCreateBody.description: Request body to create a custom category in the organization.

FlagCategoryUpdateBody.description: Request body to update a flag category by id.

FlagCategoryPreference.description: Preference object for a flag category (for example color). The object with **prefKey** `default` is created automatically on first access to the category.

FlagCategoryPreferenceUpdateBody.description: Request body to update flag category preferences.

get.summary: View flags list for an organization
get.description:
Returns a **flags** list for the organization.

**OAuth scope:** **`ag1`**

**Request URL:** `GET https://sandboxapi.deere.com/platform/organizations/{orgId}/flags`

parameters.name: itemLimit
parameters.description: Page size when the response is a CollectionPage: multiples of 10, max 100.

parameters.name: showLinks
parameters.description: Omit links with `none`, or filter to specific `rel` values.

parameters.name: Accept
parameters.description: Must be `application/vnd.deere.axiom.v3+json` for Axiom v3 responses.

200.description: Flags for the organization (array or CollectionPage with `values`).

401.description: Unauthorized — missing, invalid, or expired token.

403.description: Forbidden — insufficient permissions, missing scopes, restricted organization (RCA), or organization not connected.

429.description: Too many requests — honor `Retry-After` when present.

503.description: Service unavailable — retry with backoff; honor `Retry-After` when present.

post.description:
Creates a **flag** in the given organization.

**OAuth scope:** **`ag3`**

**Request URL:** `POST https://sandboxapi.deere.com/platform/organizations/{orgId}/flags`

**Content-Type:** `application/vnd.deere.axiom.v3+json`

x-codeSamples.label: cURL
x-codeSamples.source:
curl --request POST \
  --url 'https://sandboxapi.deere.com/platform/organizations/283480/flags' \
  --header 'Authorization: Bearer <access_token>' \
  --header 'Accept: application/vnd.deere.axiom.v3+json' \
  --header 'Content-Type: application/vnd.deere.axiom.v3+json' \
  --data '{"name":"North pivot issue","flagCategoryId":"a101004d-beb8-471d-b144-c44bb5318e01"}'

200.description: Flag created (or 201 depending on platform behavior).

403.description: Forbidden — missing `ag3` or insufficient org permission.

get.summary: Get a flag by organization and flag id
get.description:
Returns a **flag** for the given organization and flag id.

**OAuth scope:** **`ag1`**

**Request URL:** `GET https://sandboxapi.deere.com/platform/organizations/{orgId}/flags/{flagId}`

404.description: Flag not found or id not valid for this user.

put.description:
Updates a **flag** by organization and flag id.

**OAuth scope:** **`ag3`**

**Request URL:** `PUT https://sandboxapi.deere.com/platform/organizations/{orgId}/flags/{flagId}`

x-codeSamples.label: cURL
x-codeSamples.source:
curl --request PUT \
  --url 'https://sandboxapi.deere.com/platform/organizations/283480/flags/c303004d-beb8-471d-b144-c44bb5318e55' \
  --header 'Authorization: Bearer <access_token>' \
  --header 'Accept: application/vnd.deere.axiom.v3+json' \
  --header 'Content-Type: application/vnd.deere.axiom.v3+json' \
  --data '{"name":"North pivot issue — resolved"}'

delete.summary: Delete a flag for a given org
delete.description:
Deletes a single **flag** based on its id and organization id.

**OAuth scope:** **`ag3`**

**Request URL:** `DELETE https://sandboxapi.deere.com/platform/organizations/{orgId}/flags/{flagId}`

200.description: Flag deleted (or 204 No Content depending on platform behavior).

get.description:
Returns a list of **flag** objects associated with the **field**.

**OAuth scope:** **`ag1`**

**Request URL:** `GET https://sandboxapi.deere.com/platform/organizations/{orgId}/fields/{fieldId}/flags`

parameters.name: itemLimit
parameters.description: Page size when the response is a CollectionPage: multiples of 10, max 100.

200.description: Flags for the field (array or CollectionPage).

get.description:
Returns a **flag category** collection for the organization.

**OAuth scope:** **`ag1`**

**Request URL:** `GET https://sandboxapi.deere.com/platform/organizations/{orgId}/flagCategories`

post.description:
Creates a **custom category** in the given organization.

**OAuth scope:** **`ag3`**

**Request URL:** `POST https://sandboxapi.deere.com/platform/organizations/{orgId}/flagCategories`

x-codeSamples.label: cURL
x-codeSamples.source:
curl --request POST \
  --url 'https://sandboxapi.deere.com/platform/organizations/283480/flagCategories' \
  --header 'Authorization: Bearer <access_token>' \
  --header 'Accept: application/vnd.deere.axiom.v3+json' \
  --header 'Content-Type: application/vnd.deere.axiom.v3+json' \
  --data '{"name":"Custom scouting notes"}'

get.description:
Returns a **flag category** with the name translated into the specified language. The category can be a reference **flagCategory**, a master **flagCategory** created from a referenced **flagCategory**, or a **user-defined** category.

**OAuth scope:** **`ag1`**

**Request URL:** `GET https://sandboxapi.deere.com/platform/organizations/{orgId}/flagCategories/{categoryId}`

put.summary: Update flag category by organization and flag category id
put.description:
Updates a **flag category** by id.

**OAuth scope:** **`ag3`**

**Request URL:** `PUT https://sandboxapi.deere.com/platform/organizations/{orgId}/flagCategories/{categoryId}`

x-codeSamples.label: cURL
x-codeSamples.source:
curl --request PUT \
  --url 'https://sandboxapi.deere.com/platform/organizations/283480/flagCategories/a101004d-beb8-471d-b144-c44bb5318e01' \
  --header 'Authorization: Bearer <access_token>' \
  --header 'Accept: application/vnd.deere.axiom.v3+json' \
  --header 'Content-Type: application/vnd.deere.axiom.v3+json' \
  --data '{"name":"Scouting notes (updated)"}'

delete.description:
Deletes a single **empty** category based on **categoryId** and **orgId**.

**OAuth scope:** **`ag3`**

**Request URL:** `DELETE https://sandboxapi.deere.com/platform/organizations/{orgId}/flagCategories/{categoryId}`

get.description:
Returns a collection of **FlagCategoryPreference** objects for the given **flag category**. The object with **prefKey** `default` is created automatically on first access to the **flagCategory** by a client. The default preference is initialized with **prefKey:** `default`, **hexColor:** `#FFFFFF`.

**OAuth scope:** **`ag1`**

**Request URL:** `GET https://sandboxapi.deere.com/platform/organizations/{orgId}/flagCategories/{categoryId}/flagCategoryPreferences`

get.summary: View preferences object for a category
get.description:
Returns the **preferences** object for the given flag category and organization.

**OAuth scope:** **`ag1`**

**Request URL:** `GET https://sandboxapi.deere.com/platform/organizations/{orgId}/flagCategoryPreferences/{flagCategoryPreferencesId}`

put.description:
Updates **flag category preferences** by id and organization.

**OAuth scope:** **`ag3`**

**Request URL:** `PUT https://sandboxapi.deere.com/platform/organizations/{orgId}/flagCategoryPreferences/{flagCategoryPreferencesId}`
